summary:
This dental numbering scheme corresponds to the Universal Numbering System used globally for identifying all thirty-two adult human teeth systematically across both jaws.
The provided diagram aligns precisely with the structure defined by the International Federation of Dental Associations' standard method known as the Universal Numbering System. Sentence was simplified while retaining core information about global identification standards applicable here.
